issues.title: Unused variable warnings in test code
issues.detail: Six instances of unused `body` variables in test file (lines 671, 1217, 1235, 1479, 1499, 1517). Each uses `unwrap_or_default()` which silently swallows JSON parse errors. While not failing the test, this pattern could mask response deserialization issues.

issues.title: Future incompatibility warnings from dependencies
issues.detail: redis v0.24.0 and sqlx-postgres v0.7.4 contain code that will be rejected by future Rust versions. Not currently blocking but should be monitored for upgrade path.

issues.title: Lock status mismatch
issues.detail: Expected status='locked' but found status='pending'. The lock may not have been fully committed or is in a transient state.

issues.title: RPC Connection Timeout
issues.detail: The L1 RPC endpoint (https://rpc.sepolia.org/) did not respond within the timeout window. This is an infrastructure issue, not a contract or state regression. Retry when network connectivity is restored.
